prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科组最低位次约23592→24275→18625→45869，2024年大幅前移后2025年因新高考选科分组（再选化学组）位次显著后移至45869名，2025年基准约45 869名；本省理科组计划2022–2023年42人、2024年44人、2025年57人、2026年计划62人，较2025年扩招约8.77%，连续三年扩招趋势明显。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第63名（2026年），近年排名持续上升（2021年103名→2025年61名），学校综合实力稳步提升；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因2 025年该校在河北、河南等地录取位次下滑超500名，中医学专业在部分省份出现断档；抖音热度排名103（一般），短视频曝光量偏低，报考关注度无明显升温信号；中医学A+、中西医结合A+、中药学A-等为核心优势学科；中医学（领军人才培养计划/卓越5+3一体化）、中西医临床医学（华佗班）等专业学科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引 力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中医学/临床医学/口腔医学等医学大类持续高热推荐，药学、中药学等专业社会热度偏热；本省2026年考生总数535000人，较2025年（历史类+物 理类共462767人）增长约15.6%，竞争加剧；北京中医药大学位于北京，对西南地区考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在四川招生占 比约2%-3%（2025年数据），属中等偏下水平，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次45869、2026年扩招约8.77%及本省考生增长约15.6%，考生增 幅超过扩招幅度，竞争总体加剧；声誉偏负面使报考热度略有降温，但学校排名持续上升及医学专业高热对位次形成支撑。预测2026年最低位次约48083名，区间47583–48583名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 23592 → 24275 → 18625 → 45869. After a significant advance in 2024, the ranking notably shifted back to 45869 in 2025 due to the new Gaokao subject grouping (chemistry re-selection group). The baseline for 2025 is about 45869. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 42 in 2022–2023, 44 in 2024, 57 in 2025, and 62 in 2026, an expansion of about 8.77% compared to 2025, showing a clear trend of consecutive expansion for three years.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 63rd (2026), with rankings continuously rising in recent years (103rd in 2021 → 61st in 2025), steadily improving overall strength. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a decline of over 500 places in admission rankings in Hebei, Henan, and other provinces in 2025, with Chinese Medicine majors experiencing gaps in some provinces. Douyin popularity ranking 103 (average), short video exposure is relatively low, with no clear signal of increased application attention. Chinese Medicine A+, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine A+, Chinese Materia Medica A- are core advantageous disciplines. Majors such as Chinese Medicine (Leading Talent Training Plan/Excellent 5+3 Integrated), Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine (Hua Tuo Class) have top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical categories such as Chinese Medicine, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended. Pharmacy, Chinese Materia Medica, and other majors have relatively high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (history + physics categories totaling 462,767), intensifying competition. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, offering strong cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwest region. The university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2%-3% (2025 data), which is moderately low, with regional preference having a neutral impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 45869, an enrollment expansion of about 8.77% in 2026, and a provincial candidate increase of about 15.6%, the candidate growth exceeds the expansion rate, intensifying overall competition. The somewhat negative reputation slightly cools application popularity, but the continuous rise in school ranking and high popularity of medical majors support the ranking. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 48083, with a range of 47583–48583.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)

- Chinese Medicine (Excellent 5+3 Integrated)
- Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine (Hua Tuo Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Chinese Materia Medica
- Chinese Medicine Pharmacy
- Pharmaceutical Administration
- Nursing
- Big Data Management and Application (Cheng Siwei Top Talent Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 47583–48583, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<47583), you can focus on sprinting for top projects like the Chinese Medicine Leading Talent Training Plan. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>48583), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors such as Nursing and Pharmaceutical Administration as safety nets.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 3898 → 3030 → 3727 → 3628, showing a fluctuating trend in recent three years, with a baseline of about 3628 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts group plan was 5 students each year from 2022 to 2025, and increased to 6 students in 2026, a 20% expansion compared to 2025, which alleviates competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 63rd (2026), with continuous improvement in recent years (103rd in 2021 → 61st in 2025), steadily enhancing overall strength; reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to a drop of over 500 places in admission rankings in Hebei, Henan and other provinces in 2025 compared to 2024, and gaps in Chinese Medicine programs in Heilongjiang, Jilin and other provinces; Douyin popularity ranking 103 (average), low short video exposure, no clear signal of increased application attention; Chinese Medicine A+, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine A+, Chinese Materia Medica A- are core advantageous disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength in Acupuncture and Tuina, Chinese Materia Medica, etc., strongly attracting medical applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Medicine/Acupuncture and Tuina belong to the medical category, with high social popularity; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (history + physics categories total 462,767), intensifying competition; Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, with strong cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwest region; the university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2%-3% (2025 data), at a medium-low level, with neutral impact of regional preference on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3628, the 20% expansion in 2026, and the approximately 15.6% increase in provincial examinees, the expansion effect and examinee increase roughly offset each other; the somewhat negative reputation and average Douyin popularity slightly cool application enthusiasm, but the continuous rise in university ranking and high popularity of medical majors support the ranking. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 4043, with a range of 3543–4543.
